products.name: Connected Cooling and Boiler Optimization
products.description: Connected water-treatment and monitoring product for the plant's core utility loops, combining telemetry, chemistry, alerting, and field execution.

interfaces.name: Utilities Operations Workspace
interfaces.description: Web workspace for loop performance, alarms, and recommendations.

interfaces.name: Field Response App
interfaces.description: Mobile response workflow for alarms, field actions, and confirmations.

neededBricks.whyNeeded: Captures the live utility-loop signals that make early intervention possible.
Turns operating data into treatment and risk guidance.
Supports connected control and feed changes.
Provides the loop-specific performance logic for cooling and boiler systems.
Provides the loop-specific performance logic for cooling and boiler systems.
Routes issues to the right response workflow.

products.name: Enterprise Water Intelligence and Value Management
products.description: Enterprise control-tower product for water benchmarking, leak and flow analysis, savings verification, and account expansion reviews.

interfaces.name: Enterprise Water Portal
interfaces.description: Web portal for enterprise benchmarking, value proof, and portfolio review.

neededBricks.whyNeeded: Creates the fleet water-balance and leak view that underpins enterprise decisions.
Benchmarks sites and identifies outliers and opportunities.
Proves value and supports renewal and expansion cases.
neededBricks.brickName: Verified Savings and Project ROI Tracker

neededBricks.whyNeeded: Publishes the enterprise operating and executive views.
Connects the program into customer enterprise systems.

products.name: Wastewater Compliance and Reuse Control
products.description: Connected wastewater and reuse product for discharge risk reduction, compliance evidence, and circular-water expansion.

interfaces.name: Wastewater Compliance Workspace
interfaces.description: Web workspace for treatment performance, compliance status, and reporting evidence.

neededBricks.whyNeeded: Provides the wastewater process monitoring and risk model.
Prioritizes compliance issues and routes action.
Builds the audit-ready record and reporting pack.
Tracks reuse readiness and circular-water operations.
Creates accountable field and corrective-action execution.
